headline: Building computation for design.
bio1: My work connects computational tools to real-world architectural and sustainability challenges. I build pipelines that move fluidly between Revit, Rhino/Grasshopper, EnergyPlus, and Python — translating building geometry into simulation, simulation into data, and data into decisions.
bio2: Recent threads include automated ADA accessibility compliance checking from IFC models, climate-validity frameworks for LEED v4 analysis, and multi-output ML pipelines that predict building energy loads from EnergyPlus inputs.
affiliation:
Department of Architectural Studies
University of Missouri–Columbia
MS in Design with Digital Media
